title: context_emotion model_metadata
description: metadata.json that the modeling team must ship inside a candidate package. Read by package_emotion_model.py / validate_model_artifacts.py / promote_model.py. Validated by minimal hand-rolled checks in deployment/model_store.py (no jsonschema dependency at runtime - this file is the human-readable contract, not an enforced schema validator).

version.description: Must match the candidates/{version}/ directory name.

label_schema_version.description: Must match label_schema.json's version field shipped alongside this metadata.json.

checkpoint_source.description: Path or URI to the .pt checkpoint this ONNX was exported from - for traceability only, not read by any script.
